Package neqsim.process.operations.envelope

Class OperationalMargin

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.operations.envelope.OperationalMargin
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<OperationalMargin>
public final class OperationalMargin extends Object implements Serializable, Comparable<OperationalMargin>
Snapshot of one operating margin derived from an equipment capacity constraint.

The margin is advisory: it does not replace the equipment-specific constraint source, but gives operational workflows a consistent ranking and JSON representation for dashboards, MCP tools, and plant-data evidence packages.

Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL

  • Constructor Details

    • OperationalMargin

      public OperationalMargin(String equipmentName, String constraintName, double currentValue, double limitValue, double utilizationPercent, double marginPercent, String unit, String constraintType, String severity, String dataSource, String description, boolean minimumConstraint, boolean hardLimitExceeded)
      Creates an operational margin snapshot.
      Parameters:
      equipmentName - equipment name
      constraintName - constraint name
      currentValue - current value in the constraint unit
      limitValue - design or minimum limit value in the constraint unit
      utilizationPercent - current utilization in percent
      marginPercent - remaining margin in percent
      unit - engineering unit
      constraintType - constraint type name
      severity - constraint severity name
      dataSource - design data source label
      description - human-readable constraint description
      minimumConstraint - true when lower values are worse
      hardLimitExceeded - true when an absolute hard limit is exceeded

  • Method Details

    • fromConstraint

      public static OperationalMargin fromConstraint(String equipmentName, CapacityConstraint constraint)
      Builds an operational margin from a capacity constraint.
      Parameters:
      equipmentName - equipment name
      constraint - capacity constraint to read
      Returns:
      operational margin snapshot
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the constraint is null

    • classify

      public static OperationalMargin.Status classify(double marginPercent, boolean hardLimitExceeded)
      Classifies a margin value into an operational status.
      Parameters:
      marginPercent - margin in percent
      hardLimitExceeded - true when an absolute hard limit is exceeded
      Returns:
      operational margin status
